changes.value:
drag_commands.rs:133-342

`async fn execute(&self, ctx: &CommandContext) -> Result<Value>`

The entire same-board drag completion path is untested at the command layer. This includes:
- Starting a drag session, then completing it
- Ordinal resolution via before_id/after_id/drop_index within drag context
- Verifying the task actually moves to the target column
- Error cases (no active session, invalid target column)

The underlying MoveTaskCmd ordinal logic is tested separately, but DragCompleteCmd has its own orchestration that duplicates some of that logic. #coverage-gap
